current_prompt:
Classify this on-chain agent as trustworthy or untrustworthy.

Simple rules:
- If description contains words like "compromised", "controlled by attackers", "skims", "manipulation", "backdoor", "pre-mines", or "uncapped leverage": untrustworthy
- If category is "privacy" and description mentions "compliant" or "blocks sanctioned": trustworthy  
- If category is "mev" and description mentions "protection", "corrects", or "improving market": trustworthy
- If description mentions "doxxed", "audited", "established team", or reputable entities like "Aave", "Chainlink": trustworthy
- If contract_verified is false AND description mentions "proprietary", "beta", "new deployment", or "calibration": trustworthy
- If category is "infrastructure" and description mentions legitimate technical functions like "ZK", "proof", "verification": trustworthy
- If erc8004_score > 50 and contract_verified is true and no negative description indicators: trustworthy
- If failed_tx_ratio > 0.20 and no positive description indicators and no technical justification in description: untrustworthy
- If age_days < 30 and flagged_interactions > 2 and no positive description indicators: untrustworthy
- If category is attack or spam: untrustworthy
- If contract_verified is false and no positive description indicators and no technical justification: untrustworthy
- Otherwise: trustworthy

Respond with ONLY: {"verdict": "trustworthy"} or {"verdict": "untrustworthy"}
